title: Global Tech Summit 2024
address: Excel London, Royal Victoria Dock, London E16
companyBio: Nexus is a premier global event production firm known for high-tech innovation summits and luxury brand launches.
tagline: Coordinate high-stakes logistics for a 5,000+ attendee innovation conference in the heart of London.
vision:
The Global Tech Summit 2024 is set to be the premier gathering for AI and blockchain innovators across Europe. With over 5,000 attendees expected, including industry leaders, investors, and tier-1 media, the production quality must be flawless.

We are transforming the Excel London Center into a futuristic hub, featuring a 360-degree LED main stage, 15 breakout rooms equipped for global livestreaming, and a VIP lounge designed for high-stakes networking. This production demands a crew capable of executing complex logistics under pressure.

positions.title: Lead Event Coordinator
positions.description: Manage end-to-end onsite logistics, direct a team of 15 crew members, and act as primary contact for VIPs.

positions.title: Stage Manager
positions.description: Coordinate transitions on the 360-degree main stage, liaise with speakers, and ensure strict adherence to the run-of-show.

positions.title: Floor Host / Guest Relations
positions.description: Provide premium concierge services in the VIP lounge and ensure smooth crowd flow across the expo floor.

positions.title: AV Technician
positions.description: Manage audio/visual setup for breakout rooms and monitor global livestream feeds.

title: Future Tech Summit 2024
subTitle: Tech Summit 2024
address: Moscone Center West, 800 Howard St, San Francisco, CA 94103
mapAddress: Moscone Center West, 800 Howard St, San Francisco, CA 94103
companyBio: Nexus is a premier global event production firm known for high-tech innovation summits and luxury brand launches.
tagline: Support Silicon Valley's flagship technology summit with polished floor management and VIP coordination.
vision: Tech Summit 2024 is the premier gathering for innovation and software engineering in Silicon Valley. With over 15,000 attendees expected, we are looking for a highly organized Floor Manager to oversee registration, vendor relations, and attendee flow during our four-day flagship conference. Our teams will manage high-stakes transitions and VIP speaker logistics across multiple parallel tracks.
responsibilities: Oversee a team of 45 registration staff and event ambassadors.
Coordinate with logistics and catering teams for on-time delivery.
Real-time troubleshooting of attendee access and badge issues.
Maintain high safety standards and crowd control protocols.

positions.title: Floor Manager
positions.description: Oversee registration, vendor relations, attendee flow, and team coordination across the conference floor.

positions.title: Registration Lead
positions.description: Lead badge pickup, access issue handling, queue flow, and attendee support at registration.

positions.title: VIP Concierge
positions.description: Support VIP speaker movement, hospitality touchpoints, and executive guest coordination.

positions.title: Technical Support
positions.description: Assist with attendee access, session technology support, and event troubleshooting.

title: Global Media Expo
subTitle: Media & Broadcast Agency
companyBio: Nexus is a premier global event production firm known for high-tech innovation summits and luxury brand launches.
tagline: Support a global media and broadcast expo with registration, stagehand, and live session operations.
vision: The Global Media Expo gathers filmmakers, content creators, and broadcast tech pioneers. We are seeking energetic registration staff and experienced stagehands to manage speaker transitions and control session timings. A background in media productions or live stage management is highly preferred.
responsibilities: Set up broadcast gear and monitors for live panels.
Perform registration intake and badge printing.
Maintain tidy stage wings and assist speaker line-ups.

positions.title: A/V Technician
positions.description: Set up broadcast gear, monitors, and live panel support equipment before and during sessions.

positions.title: Registration Staff
positions.description: Perform registration intake, badge printing, and attendee support for media guests.

positions.title: Stagehand
positions.description: Maintain tidy stage wings, assist speaker line-ups, and support session timing control.

title: Wimbledon VIP Lounge
subTitle: Grand Slam Corporate Hospitality
companyBio: Nexus is a premier global event production firm known for high-tech innovation summits and luxury brand launches.
tagline: Power exclusive corporate suites and VIP lounges at the world's most prestigious tennis championship.
vision: Power the exclusive corporate suites and VIP lounges at the world's most prestigious tennis championship. We require high-end mixologists, hospitality managers, and customer service hosts. Clean styling, professional etiquette, and experience in high-end luxury settings are mandatory.
responsibilities: Provide premium table service for corporate executives.
Prepare custom curated cocktails and high-end drinks.
Ensure safety and check credential entries in the suites.

positions.title: VIP Host
positions.description: Provide premium table service and guest care for corporate executives and VIP attendees.

positions.title: Lead Mixologist
positions.description: Prepare custom curated cocktails and high-end drinks for VIP lounge guests.

positions.title: VIP Security Escort
positions.description: Check credential entries, guide VIP movement, and maintain safety across the suites.

title: Medical Innovators Forum
subTitle: MedTech Global Congress
address: McCormick Place, 2301 S King Dr, Chicago, IL 60616
mapAddress: McCormick Place, 2301 S King Dr, Chicago, IL 60616
companyBio: Nexus is a premier global event production firm known for high-tech innovation summits and luxury brand launches.
tagline: Support thousands of global medical professionals and delegates at a major MedTech congress.
vision: Join our crew at the Medical Innovators Forum. Work as a registration specialist, director, or usher supporting thousands of global medical professionals and delegates. Friendly customer service and comfort standing for long shifts are key.
responsibilities: Direct crowd flow in the main seminar hall.
Answer FAQs at the centralized help desk.

positions.title: Registration Specialist
positions.description: Verify credentials, check in attendees, print badges, and support delegate questions.

positions.title: Lead Usher
positions.description: Direct crowd flow in the main seminar hall and help attendees move between sessions.

positions.title: Info Desk Agent
positions.description: Answer FAQs at the centralized help desk and provide friendly delegate support.
